name: 50+ Cozy Aesthetic AI Prompts for Stunning Lifestyle Images
description: Stop spending hours trying to describe the vibe in your head. This collection of 50+ hand-crafted prompts gives you instant access to rich, atmospheric, ready-to-use scenes — from candlelit evenings and rainy windowsills to sun-drenched Mediterranean terraces and misty autumn forests.
prompt: A woman sits curled in a window seat on a grey afternoon, surrounded by an open shoebox of old photographs, letters, and small keepsakes spread carefully around her. She holds a single photograph in both hands, studying it with a soft, faraway expression. She wears a heathered lilac oversized sweater and white wide-leg trousers, her hair falling loosely forward. On the cushion beside her: a mug of tea gone slightly cold, a pen, and a fresh sheet of writing paper. Rain runs slowly down the window glass behind her. The mood is nostalgic, tender, and quietly emotional — the specific ache of remembering. Muted lilac, cream and grey palette, overcast diffused light, editorial introspective photography, soft vignette, film grain.
